heading: National Recording Registry of the Library of Congress
label: 1701 National Recording Registry of the Library of Congress
text: The Librarian of Congress shall establish the National Recording Registry for the purpose of maintaining and preserving sound recordings that are culturally, historically, or aesthetically significant.
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–474, § 1114 Stat. 2085Nov. 9, 2000“This Act [enacting this chapter and chapter 1524 of Title 36, Patriotic and National Observances, Ceremonies, and Organizations] may be cited as the ‘National Recording Preservation Act of 2000’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–474, § 1114 Stat. 2085Nov. 9, 2000“This Act [enacting this chapter and chapter 1524 of Title 36, Patriotic and National Observances, Ceremonies, and Organizations] may be cited as the ‘National Recording Preservation Act of 2000’.”
